trending_videos.title: Marvel Tōkon: Fighting Souls - Fighting Avengers Trailer | PS5 & PC Games
trending_videos.description:
https://www.playstation.com/en-us/games/marvel-tokon-fighting-souls/

The Challenge of the Champion threatens the planet, and the Fighting Avengers are the third team to answer the call!

Led by Captain America and featuring Iron Man, the Fighting Avengers bring two new characters into the fight: Shuri as Black Panther, wielding her aggressive style and Wakandan weaponry, and Hulk, angrier than ever and ready to smash his opponents!

Coming to PS5® and PC on August 6th, 2026 PT!

Follow us for all the latest updates: 
Twitter: https://x.com/MARVELTokon
BlueSky: https://bsky.app/profile/marveltokon.bsky....
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/MARVELTokon/
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/marveltokon/
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@marveltokon

trending_videos.title: Cadillac Championship, Third Round
trending_videos.description: The third round of the PGA Tour signature event gets underway at Trump National Doral in Miami. Golfers face the grueling 7,600-yard Blue Monster layout as they jockey for position to earn a massive slice of the eight-figure financial reward.

trending_videos.title: RESIDENT EVIL – Official Teaser Trailer (4K)
trending_videos.description:
𝙰 𝚗𝚎𝚠 𝚎𝚛𝚊 𝚘𝚏 𝚎𝚟𝚒𝚕.
 
From the mind of Zach Cregger, director of Weapons and Barbarian. Watch the new teaser trailer for Resident Evil. Filmed for IMAX – in theatres 9.18. 

https://www.instagram.com/residentevil/
https://twitter.com/ResidentEvil
https://www.facebook.com/ResidentEvilMovie
https://www.tiktok.com/@resident.evil.movie

From the mind of visionary filmmaker Zach Cregger (Weapons, Barbarian) comes a thrilling — and terrifying — reinvention of the Resident Evil franchise. In an all-new story, Resident Evil follows Bryan (Austin Abrams), a medical courier who unwittingly finds himself in an action-packed, non-stop race for survival as one fateful, horrifying night collapses around him in chaos.
 
From Columbia Pictures and Constantin Film, in association with TriStar Pictures, Resident Evil hits theatres September 18, 2026.

Directed by: Zach Cregger   
 
Written by: Zach Cregger & Shay Hatten    

Produced by:
Robert Kulzer
Zach Cregger
Roy Lee
Miri Yoon
Carter Swan
Asad Qizil

trending_videos.title: Buffalo Sabres at Boston Bruins
trending_videos.description: Boston and Buffalo continue their best-of-seven series in Game 6 at TD Garden. Boston won Game 5, while Buffalo leads the series 3-2. Jeremy Swayman made 26 saves, including a key pad stop. David Pastrnak scored to stave off the Bruins' elimination.

trending_videos.title: Kentucky Derby Prep
trending_videos.description: Get ready for one of horse racing's biggest events with experts from NBC Sports who will share a mixture of behind the scenes stories, unlimited access, predictions, betting tips, and more.

trending_videos.title: Knight Rider Rebirth (2026) | Jensen Ackles, Mads Mikkelsen, Scarlett Johansson | Concept Trailer
trending_videos.description:
#KnightRider2026 #JensenAckles #kitt  

This is Knight Rider 2026 Fan-Made Concept Trailer

What if the most iconic car in television history came back not as nostalgia but as a full-blown neo-noir thriller built for a world that has forgotten what heroes look like? This Knight Rider 2026 concept trailer reimagines the franchise from the ground up, casting Jensen Ackles as Michael Knight, a haunted loner dragged back into the fight when a shadow network begins dismantling everything the Foundation ever built. This version of Knight is not the charming road warrior of the original. He is worn down, reluctant, and carrying years of damage, but when Denzel Washington's calm and commanding Mentor places the keys back in his hand and a sleek Ford Mustang Mach-E lights up as KITT, something reignites. The premise is simple and ruthless: one man, one machine, one night to outrun a conspiracy that has been years in the making.

trending_videos.title: Fox & Friends Weekend
trending_videos.description: FOX & Friends Weekend, hosted by Rachel Campos-Duffy and Charlie Hurt, highlights the latest in news, entertainment, politics, and sports.

trending_videos.title: Tampa Bay Lightning at Montreal Canadiens
trending_videos.description: The Lightning and the Canadiens continue their series in Game 6 at Bell Centre. Montreal leads 3-2 after a Game 5 win. Brendan Gallagher opened the scoring for Montreal while rookie Jakub Dobes stopped 38 of 40 shots in the 3-2 Game 5 victory.

gaming.insight: High engagement potential with trailer releases for upcoming games. Collaborations with top gaming influencers could drive views.

sports.insight: Consistent demand for live sports coverage and highlight reels. Expanding into lesser-covered sports events could capture niche audiences.

entertainment.insight: Interest in upcoming movie trailers is strong. Partnering with pop culture channels for trailer breakdowns could increase reach.

music.insight: Music video releases remain a robust content type. Leveraging cross-promotions with artists on social media platforms could enhance visibility.

news.insight: News segments can capitalize on trending topics for greater reach. Integrating interactive elements like live Q&As could boost engagement.

analysis.note: Transcript analysis is more detailed, metadata analysis provides broader trends
